race.comment: ON THE MARK (1) resumes and was beaten a whisker this grade her last four. Has an awkward gate but goes fresh and has early speed. Rates strongly and the 3kg claim brings him right into it. GOLD KEEPER (7) races forward and is busting to win again. Missed by a head over 1100m last time and from the inside gate will be tough to pass. ONEMORETWOMANY (3) was back to his best beating the above home. Has the outside barrier to deal with today but has won here over this distance and can fight out the finish if things work out. LEONARDO DA GREY (13) resumes and has the ability if presented forward. Faithfull's booking suggests he's pleasing and the race day betting will be key. KOTE (2) switched from a NSW barn and was only beaten 2L over 1000m at Belmont fresh. Has won three times over this distance and is worth keeping onside.
